content.en:
In the years that followed, Ye Tian continued to look for various resources in the inner layer of the Eternal Fire Sea, although it was not much, but it was also a harvest!

He didn't make a few more copies of the body, although this would find more resources, but it was easy to be discovered by the powerhouses of the Lone Star Realm Alliance.

There are Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses here, and there is more than one, so it's better to keep a low profile.

The years passed.

Ye Tian found a lot of resources in the inner layer of the Eternal Fire Sea, most of which were Eternal Fire Sand.

As for the Eternal Flame, he also found a few, but compared to other resources, the Eternal Flame is naturally very few.

"Gotta go to the core layer of the Eternal Fire!"

Ye Tian decided.

Of course.

Before he left, he sent these resources away, lest his duplicate body fall in the core layer of the Eternal Fire Sea, and it would be a big loss~.

......

Core of the Eternal Fire.

Ye Tian came here, and then began to look for the resources and treasures here.

As a result, as soon as he came here, he encountered an Eternal Fire Spirit whose strength was comparable to that of a half-step Eternal Realm God-Realm.

"Sure enough, the core layer of the Eternal Fire Sea is very dangerous, and it doesn't have the strength of the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, I'm afraid that as soon as I enter here, I will die!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Bang!!!!!

Ye Tian and this Eternal Fire Spirit Soul were killed.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian was much stronger than the ordinary half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

So, he completely crushed this eternal fire spirit.

"Sun's Grip!"

Ye Tian used this Eternal Dao Secret Technique to capture the Eternal Fire Spirit, and although it was contested, the Spear of the Ruin Sun instantly pierced down, piercing it.

Of course.

Even so, the Eternal Fire Spirit was not dead, but was severely wounded.

Subsequently.

Ye Tiansan killed him in two clicks.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian searched for resources in the core layer of the Eternal Fire Sea, and finally found something good on this day.

"This is the Eternal Fire Vine!"

Ye Tian smiled.

This Eternal Fire Vine is located inside the lair of some Eternal Fire Spirits, but even if an ordinary half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm discovers an Eternal Fire Vine, it will not take it.

Because this thing is useless to the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, it will make the Eternal Dao Seed of the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse gradually turn into a demon seed, who would dare to refine it?

If it was such a thing as an evil vine, the Eternal Realm God Realm would dare to collect it to strengthen its own Eternal Dao Species.

But.

The Eternal Fire Vine is something that the Eternal Realm God Realm really doesn't dare to use, because the Eternal Fire Vine has another side effect, which makes the Eternal Realm God Realm a little afraid, that is, the Eternal Fire Vine can make the Eternal Realm God Realm's solidification and Eternal Dao species degrade.

The flame power attached to the Eternal Fire Vine can continuously scorch and solidify the Eternal Dao Seed, and when it strengthens the Eternal Dao Seed, it will also degrade the solidified state, which is simply a big drop in the cultivation of the Eternal Realm God Realm!

Therefore, the Eternal Fire Vine is only suitable for non-half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses, that is, for Eternal Dao Body Perfection Realm, but they have not broken through to the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

Such a strong person is in the process of strengthening the Eternal Dao Seed, so he needs the Eternal Fire Vine, but he can't resist the Demon Seed.

Therefore, the Eternal Fire Vine was evaluated by the Lone Star Nation Alliance as one of the most rubbish treasures.

However, for the Eternal Dao Body Consummation Realm powerhouse of the Perfect Eternal Dao Seed, the Eternal Fire Vine is a priceless treasure, its value is many times more valuable than the Evil Punishment Vine, and its effect is also many times better.

"The Eternal Fire Vine is of great use to the stars, and it must be taken away!"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian made a move on these Eternal Fire Spirits.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian fought with these Eternal Fire Spirits.

One by one, the Eternal Fire Spirit was gradually killed by Ye Tian.

After a long time, this Eternal Fire Vine fell into Ye Tian's hands.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left the Eternal Fire Sea, far away from the Lone Star Realm Alliance, he stopped, and then condensed a replica body, allowing this replica body to return to the Endless Realm with these resources of his.

......

Core of the Eternal Fire.

Ye Tian's replica body came back and continued to search for resource treasures.

Ye Tian inquired about the information, and what he longed for the most was a treasure called the Eternal Spark Stone, which helped solidify the Eternal Dao Seed, but the side effects were relatively large, and it would greatly affect the Demon Seed of the Eternal Dao Seed.

But this kind of treasure is very suitable for Ye Tian, if he has this kind of treasure, with the ruin sun solidification technique, then he can carry out the solidification of the eternal Dao seed faster.

So, he would love to get his hands on a large number of Eternal Sparkstones.

Time passed slowly.

this day.

Ye Tian was lucky, and finally found an Eternal Starfire Stone, and it was still a small Eternal Starlight Stone.

The Eternal Starlight Stone is crimson on the outside, and the starlight void on the inside looks extremely deep.

Moreover, the Eternal Spark Stone can also absorb the energy of the Eternal Fire Sea, although the absorption speed is slow, but it is indeed absorbing.

Therefore, Ye Tian recognized it at a glance.

"Found it!"

Ye Tian put away this Eternal Star Fire Stone, and he was in a very good mood.

After that, he kept searching, and was able to find one every once in a while.

If he continues to look for it like this for a long time, he can definitely find more Eternal Spark Stones.

As for the danger of the Eternal Fire Sea, he was not afraid at all, even if he was unlucky enough to encounter the Eternal Realm Divine Realm Eternal Fire Spirit that came out of the core layer of the Eternal Fire Sea, it would be a big deal to be killed.

Anyway, he could change to a replica body at any time.

"The other half-step Eternal Realm God Realms don't dare to easily step into the core layer of the Eternal Fire Sea, but I dare, so that I can easily find all kinds of treasure resources!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

The Endless Realm.

Ye Tian's copied body returned, bringing back the Eternal Fire Vine and other resources similar to the Eternal Fire Sand, the Eternal Fire Tinder, and so on.

He left the Eternal Fire Sand and the Eternal Flame in the Terran Temple, and if anyone wanted to exchange it, they would exchange it.

And the eternal fire vine, he naturally wants to give it to his wife and children.

this day.

Ye Xingchen came to Ye Tian.

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen said respectfully.

Ye Tian took out the Eternal Fire Vine, "This is a treasure I found in the Eternal Fire Sea on the side of the Lone Star Realm Alliance, similar to the Evil Punishment Vine, but it is more domineering than the Evil Punishment Vine, it can degenerate the solidified Eternal Dao Seed, and it can also make the Eternal Dao Seed Demon Seed." Therefore, even the Eternal Realm God Realm did not dare to use it. Your Eternal Dao Seed has not been solidified, and it is a perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed, not afraid of demon seeding, which is extremely suitable for you. When your Eternal Dao Seed has reached its limit, give your Eternal Fire Vine to your mother. "

"Yes, Father!"

Ye Xingchen was overjoyed.
